arts.ttl: Dream Arsenal striker transfer scenario emerges as bid 'rejected' for Mikel Arteta target
arts.sum: Arsenal target Evan Ferguson is allowed to leave Brighton & Hove Albion this month, it has been reported. With Ferguson now having got the green light to leave Brighton this month, Arsenal can make their move.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make Myles Lewis-Skelly red card appeal decision as FA hearing planned
arts.sum: Arsenal have submitted an appeal to the FA challenging the red card received by Myles Lewis-Skelly against Wolves at the weekend. He added: "Well hopefully we don't need to [appeal].

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Girona - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting how Arsenal could line up for their Champions League clash against Girona on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Report: £67m striker has now decided to leave his club after holding talks with Arsenal
EA FC 25 TOTW 20 predictions with Liverpool, Arsenal and Barcelona stars
arts.sum: The EA FC 25 TOTW 20 squad will be released this week, replacing the EA FC 25 TOTW 19 squad that's currently available in Ultimate Team packs

arts.ttl: Arsenal teenager Heaven on brink of Man Utd move
arts.sum: Manchester United are close to completing a deal for Arsenal's teenage central defender Ayden Heaven.

arts.ttl: Arsenal close to transfer agreement for 'new Martin Odegaard' after Erling Haaland hint
arts.sum: Girona, part of the City Football Group, are also vying for Nypan, with Rosenborg said to be asking for £10 million upfront plus'significant add-ons'. With potential departures on the horizon with Thomas Partey and Jorginho's contracts expiring in the summer, Arsenal are eyeing midfield reinforcements.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans now urge Mikel Arteta to sign £14m 'nightmare for defenders' instead of Alexander Isak
Arsenal given MAJOR boost in pursuit of Sesko alternative
arts.sum: A loan with an option to buy could prove ideal for Arsenal due to their PSR constraints, with the potential to permanently sign Ferguson a tempting proposition for Arteta as he seeks his long-term solution up front . Having begun last season with six goals in the first 12 Premier League games, Ferguson suffered a six-month injury, leading to a run of 11 months without finding the back of the net.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face deadline day decision as fan favourite set for EMOTIONAL transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal face deadline day decision as fan favourite set for EMOTIONAL transfer Tierney was a key player for Arsenal in his first seasons at the club, often captaining the side and establishing himself as a fan favourite for the Gunners.
